verses.1: A Song of degrees. They that trust in the LORD, shall be as mount Zion, which cannot be removed, but abideth for ever.
verses.2: As the mountains are round Jerusalem, so the LORD is around his people from henceforth even for ever.
verses.3: For the rod of the wicked shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; lest the righteous put forth their hands to iniquity.
verses.4: Do good, O LORD, to those that are good, and to them that are upright in their hearts.
verses.5: As for such as turn aside to their crooked ways, the LORD shall lead them forth with the workers of iniquity: but peace shall be upon Israel.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
